creator: dettus@dettus.net
text:
Created attachment 239773
dMagnetic_0.36

I know that it has only been a couple of days, but my project saw another release.

My apologies that this causes more work than it should.

Anyways, the patch is attached to this bugreport, hopefully it can become part of your ports tree once more. The changes to the project are best summed up in the changelog for the Debian package:

  * Minor bugfixes
  * Backend engine can be encapsulated in a library
  * HelloWorld example for interested frontend developers

Thomas Dettbarn
